category_sources: source_facts.description says it uses CSS selectors to extract content from HTML files; official GitHub README says it is like jq but for HTML.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is htmlq; official GitHub README title uses htmlq.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README provides installation, usage, options, and examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated as https://github.com/mgdm/htmlq, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it extracts HTML content with CSS selectors; official GitHub README documents CSS selector arguments and Rust/Cargo installation.
